---
title: "Basic Matrix Algebra"
subtitle: "161.251 Regression Modelling"
date: |
  `r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y')`
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: false
    code_download: true
    css: ../shared/lecture.css
    includes:
      in_header: ../shared/course-header.html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

lecture_slug <- "matrix-algebra"

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = file.path(
    "../build/lectures",
    paste0(lecture_slug, "_files/figure-html/")
  ),
  cache.path = file.path(
    "../build/cache/lectures",
    paste0(lecture_slug, "/")
  )
)
```

```{r child-matrix-algebra, child="../lecture-content/12-matrix-algebra.Rmd"}
```
